etymology.description: phonetic: 交(交) (jiāo, "mix") + semantic: 攵(攵) (pū, "to strike; action") -> result
etymology.interpretation: In 效(效) (xiào, "result"), 交(交) (jiāo, "mix") provides the pronunciation while 攵(攵) (pū, "to strike; action") conveys the idea of performing an action to achieve a result.
etymology.simplification: In simplified form, 效(效) retains its structure, differing from other cases where components might be reduced.

examples.chinese: 努力工作才能看到好的效果(努力工作才能看到好的效果)。
examples.pinyin: Nǔlì gōngzuò cáinéng kàndào hǎo de xiàoguǒ.
examples.english: Only by working hard can we see good results.

examples.chinese: 这种药的效果很好(這種藥的效果很好)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào de xiàoguǒ hěn hǎo.
examples.english: The effect of this medicine is very good.

examples.chinese: 他们为达到最佳效果需要更多时间(他們為達到最佳效果需要更多時間)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen wèi dádào zuìjiā xiàoguǒ xūyào gèng duō shíjiān.
examples.english: They need more time to achieve the best results.
